Cutting excess [[Plains]] and the off-scope [[Shrieking Drake]] keeps the update focused on mana consistency.

summary: Transformed: Curve tightening. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~4.25.
why: This pass tightens the curve so [[Gishath, Sun's Avatar]] can be supported by more affordable plays before the top end takes over. The additions improve early deployment, add efficient Dinosaur bodies, and smooth creature-focused mana without changing the deck's broader game plan. Because this was a focused curve pass, no existing cards were cut in this final set of changes.

The cuts trim more purely proactive payoff pieces to make room for answers.

summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~1.68.
why: This pass cleans up the manabase and interaction package while keeping the deck lean for Modern. [[Fiery Islet]], [[Thundering Falls]], [[Otawara, Soaring City]], and [[Hall of Storm Giants]] improve land quality and utility after the cleanup. [[Spell Pierce]] adds cheap stack interaction, and removing [[Fury]] aligns the list with Modern legality while trimming one basic [[Island]] to stabilize the updated land mix.

General cleanup restored land count stability for this constructed deck.
